name: City Life RPG
description:
An open world RPG where you are a townsfolk in this big, colorful city. This city is called Solarium to be particular.

Your character can range from a simple human, a stray animal, or even a puny cockroach — and everything in between. You can destroy the city or just live in it.

P.S., this city is full of crime and criminals, and it’s as dirty as New York City (no hate, I love New York).

Dead dove tag was added in case anybody wants to be violent, and it’s limitless because… that’s self explanatory.
creator: Weezer.
